name: OpenFinClaw
description: Complete financial tools suite - strategy builder, backtest, market data, and trading tools. Use fin-strategy-builder skill to create FEP v1.2 strategy packages.

backtestApiUrl.description: Backtest API base URL (e.g. https://backtest.openfinclaw.ai). No trailing slash.

backtestApiKey.description: API key for backtest server. Get your key at https://hub.openfinclaw.ai
